title: monotagma nutans
intro: Monotagma nutans, also known as the 'tiger orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. It is native to tropical regions in Central and South America, particularly in countries such as Costa Rica and Panama. The medicinal properties of Monotagma nutans include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
